title: geniostoma borbonicum
intro: Geniostoma borbonicum, also known as the Borbon Island geniostoma, is a flowering plant species native to the island of Réunion in the Indian Ocean. It has been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is said to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues, including bronchitis and asthma. Geniostoma borbonicum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions for medicinal use.
